description: Time-bounded audit advisory allowlist. Expired entries are treated as active (blocking) again.

allowlist.reason: esbuild dev server CSRF (MODERATE) -- dev-only via wrangler@3.114.17 -> esbuild@0.17.19. Surfaces/workers build tool only.
allowlist.why_not_exploitable: esbuild dev server is only used during local worker development builds. Not exposed in production. wrangler 3.114.17 is the latest 3.x; wrangler 4.x is a major version change requiring separate evaluation.
allowlist.remediation: Evaluate wrangler 4.x migration or wait for 3.x backport
allowlist.verified_by: pnpm audit --prod shows no MODERATE; pnpm why esbuild confirms wrangler-only path

allowlist.reason: undici decompression bomb (MODERATE) -- dev-only via wrangler@3.114.17 -> miniflare -> undici@5.29.0. Local dev tool only.
allowlist.why_not_exploitable: undici is used by miniflare (local Cloudflare Workers simulator) for HTTP fetches during development. Not in published packages. No external HTTP responses are processed in production via this path.
allowlist.remediation: Evaluate wrangler 4.x migration or wait for 3.x backport
allowlist.verified_by: pnpm audit --prod shows no MODERATE; pnpm why undici confirms wrangler-only path

allowlist.reason: ajv $data ReDoS (MODERATE) -- transitive via eslint@10 -> ajv@6.12.6. Direct ajv dependency bumped to 8.18.0 (patched). Remaining path is eslint's internal ajv v6.
allowlist.why_not_exploitable: ajv v6 is used internally by eslint for config schema validation. No user-supplied data reaches ajv's $data code path in our usage. Dev-only linting tool.
allowlist.where_used: Root devDependency chain: eslint@10.0.1 -> ajv@6.12.6; typescript-eslint@8.56.0 -> eslint -> ajv@6.12.6
allowlist.remediation: Wait for eslint to upgrade internal ajv dependency to >= 8.18.0
allowlist.verified_by: pnpm audit --prod shows no MODERATE; direct ajv bumped to 8.18.0; remaining is eslint transitive

allowlist.reason: undici WebSocket permessage-deflate memory consumption (HIGH) -- dev-only via wrangler@3.114.17 -> miniflare -> undici@5.29.0. Local dev tool only.
allowlist.why_not_exploitable: undici 5.29.0 is used by miniflare (local Cloudflare Workers simulator). Not in published packages. Production uses undici 6.24.0 (patched). No WebSocket connections in the miniflare dev path reach external servers.
allowlist.remediation: Evaluate wrangler 4.x migration or wait for 3.x backport
allowlist.verified_by: pnpm audit --prod shows no HIGH for undici; pnpm ls undici -r confirms 6.24.0 in prod, 5.29.0 only in wrangler dev path

allowlist.reason: undici WebSocket server_max_window_bits validation (HIGH) -- dev-only via wrangler@3.114.17 -> miniflare -> undici@5.29.0. Local dev tool only.
allowlist.why_not_exploitable: undici 5.29.0 is used by miniflare (local Cloudflare Workers simulator). Not in published packages. Production uses undici 6.24.0 (patched). No WebSocket connections in the miniflare dev path reach external servers.
allowlist.remediation: Evaluate wrangler 4.x migration or wait for 3.x backport
allowlist.verified_by: pnpm audit --prod shows no HIGH for undici; pnpm ls undici -r confirms 6.24.0 in prod, 5.29.0 only in wrangler dev path

allowlist.reason: handlebars AST type confusion (CRITICAL) -- dev-only via ts-jest@29.4.5 -> handlebars@4.7.8. Test tool only.
allowlist.why_not_exploitable: handlebars is used by ts-jest for internal template compilation. Not in published packages. No user-supplied templates are processed. Dev-only test infrastructure.
allowlist.remediation: Wait for handlebars 4.8.0+ or ts-jest to drop handlebars dependency
allowlist.verified_by: pnpm audit --prod shows no CRITICAL; pnpm why handlebars confirms ts-jest-only path

allowlist.reason: handlebars CLI precompiler injection (HIGH) -- dev-only via ts-jest@29.4.5 -> handlebars@4.7.8. Test tool only; CLI precompiler not used.
allowlist.why_not_exploitable: handlebars CLI precompiler is not invoked in PEAC builds. handlebars is only loaded by ts-jest for template compilation. Dev-only.
allowlist.remediation: Wait for handlebars 4.8.0+ or ts-jest to drop handlebars dependency
allowlist.verified_by: pnpm audit --prod shows no HIGH for handlebars

allowlist.reason: handlebars AST type confusion (HIGH) -- dev-only via ts-jest@29.4.5 -> handlebars@4.7.8. Test tool only.
allowlist.why_not_exploitable: handlebars is only loaded by ts-jest for template compilation. No user-supplied templates. Dev-only.
allowlist.remediation: Wait for handlebars 4.8.0+ or ts-jest to drop handlebars dependency
allowlist.verified_by: pnpm audit --prod shows no HIGH for handlebars

allowlist.verified_by: pnpm audit --prod shows no HIGH for handlebars

allowlist.reason: Vite dev server arbitrary file read (HIGH): dev-only via vitest@4.1.0 -> vite@6.4.1. Not exposed in production.
allowlist.why_not_exploitable: Vite dev server is only used during local test runs via vitest. Not in published packages or production deployments.
allowlist.remediation: Update vite when vitest ships a fix or vite patches the dev server vulnerability
allowlist.verified_by: pnpm audit --prod shows no HIGH for vite; pnpm why vite confirms vitest-only path

allowlist.reason: defu prototype pollution via __proto__ key (HIGH): dev-only transitive dependency. Not in published packages.
allowlist.why_not_exploitable: defu is a transitive dev dependency used in build/test tooling. Not in published packages. No user-controlled input reaches defu in production.
allowlist.remediation: Update when upstream patches or when the consuming tool updates its dependency
allowlist.verified_by: pnpm audit --prod shows no HIGH for defu
